card.name: Clearingsong CLE
card.text: Rules of Clearingsong - The world is full of beautiful variety - Evil exists but it can be beaten - Friendship takes all kinds - This is not a world of warriors - The elders are hidebound and silly but the children can work together - Everything has detail and texture - No mammals Principles of design - Elegance. Find the elegant cards that haven't been made - Friendliness. Don't play with fire. - Diversity. Each card encourages you to play other, different cards.

card.name: Loess Lightbearer
card.text: Aspire — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Monsoon Fortune-Teller
card.text: Aspire — When you scry or surveil, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.) This creature can't attack unless it has aspired.

card.name: Odds-and-Ends-Monger
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard. Menace

card.name: Haughty Thespian
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Branch-Bender
card.text: Trample Aspire — When you spend five or more mana to cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and scry 2. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Poultice Courier
card.text: Flying Aspire — When you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and scry 1. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Eavesdrop
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: Hammerhead Bully
card.text: Menace Aspire — When an opponent or a spell or permanent an opponent controls becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Fiery Celebration
card.text: Choose one — • Fiery Celebration deals 2 damage to target creature. • Fiery Celebration deals damage to target creature equal to the number of different powers among creatures you control.

card.name: Aurora Chronicler
card.text: Aspire — When you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.) {T}: Add {C}. If this creature has aspired, instead add one mana of any color.

card.name: Snowpearl Sorter
card.text: Kicker {1} (You may pay an additional {1} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if ti was kicked, exile up to one target creature. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step. Flying

card.name: Flashy Aerobatics
card.text: Draw two cards. If you control a creature with flying, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Comet Recollector
card.text: Aspire — When another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Chinook Wumprider
card.text: Haste Aspire — When you attack with three or more creatures, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Verdant Tender
card.text: {3}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you spent three colors of mana to activate this ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Old-Law Sentinel
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If that creature has mana value 1, put two +1/+1 counters on it instead.

card.name: Rainshadow Shield
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If you control a Wizard, instead counter that spell unless its controller pays {4}.

card.name: Bounding Squangler
card.text: Deathtouch As long as there is a sorcery card in your graveyard, this creature has flying.

card.name: Gregarious Kindler
card.text: Menace Aspire — When you activate an ability that isn't a mana ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Rivertrance
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+X and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Petalwind Mage
card.text: Creatures you control with flying get +1/+1.

card.name: Snappy Goldenwing
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target instant card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Souldust Shepherd
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Flying When this creature enters, if it was kicked, create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens.

card.name: Magma Forging
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control an Elemental. Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Wondrous View
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has {T}: Add two mana of any one color. When this enchantment enters, if you control a Scout or Ranger, draw a card.

card.name: Joyful Disposition
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Majestic Kirin
card.text: This creature can't be blocked if you've drawn two or more cards this turn. {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: High Observator's Judgment
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a creature with menace. Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Splashy Syrupcaster
card.text: Kicked spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Ram Through
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If the creature you control has trample, excess damage is dealt to that creature's controller instead.

card.name: Lost to Myth
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target artifact or creature an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Befuddled Apprentice
card.text: Aspire — When you cast your second spell in a turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Wisdom of Experience
card.text: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life. If you control a creature that has aspired, instead you draw two cards and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Hermit of the Quairies
card.text: Flying Discard a card: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Ribbon Range Guide
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Ranger creature token. If this creature was kicked, put three +1/+1 counters on that token.

card.name: Shining Rebuke
card.text: Shining Rebuke deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Hibernate
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Diviner's Toad
card.text: When this creature enters, you lose 1 life and draw a card. {3}{B}: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Fresh-Brewed Firenectar
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Fresh-Brewed Firenectar deals 3 damage to any target. If it was kicked, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Pebblemage
card.text: Vigilance, trample {4}{G}{G}: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mournful Craftsbug
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if you control a token, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Sink
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, instead its owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Knight of the Humblebee
card.text: Flying, lifelink

card.name: Kindletouch
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, enchanted creature deals 4 damage to up to one target creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has menace.

card.name: Helpful Topiary
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you gain 3 life and surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Reliquary Cleanser
card.text: Vigilance {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Possessive Archmage
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 2.

card.name: Might-Tracker's Bow
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Equip {3}

card.name: Stompin' Boots
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has haste. Equip {2}

card.name: Lettuce Leaper
card.text: Reach

card.name: Defend the Outlands
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. • Create a 2/2 green Ranger creature token. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Pinion Gilder
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Flying When this creature enters, if it was kicked, another target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Venomous Voice
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) Destroy target creature with mana value 2 or less. If this spell was kicked, instead destroy target creature with mana value 4 or less.

card.name: Shroomglow Collector
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Adventure Awaits
card.text: Mill two cards. Return a permanent card milled this way to your hand. Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Lumizoa
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Flying, vigilance When this creature enters, if it was kicked, you draw a card and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Playful Diver
card.text: Vigilance {3}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Hero's Downfall
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Slippery Critter
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Trample, haste When this creature enters, if it was kicked, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Bushwhack
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Skylands Vinecutter
Introduction to Blobology
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. {1}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Heavy Burden
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -3/-3.

card.name: Ornery Wagonbeard
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control an artifact. When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Defender of the Patch
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Old Jade Guardian
card.text: When this creature enters, if you spent three mana of the same color to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: Friendly Fisher
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Sparkling Staff
Everglass
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: You gain 1 life.

card.name: Chromatic Star
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Promising Sunscape
card.text: When this land enters, sacrifice it. if you do, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, the shuffle. Scry 1.

card.name: Stoneword Reciter
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Pollywog Gossbearer
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Nova Reenactor
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Leaf-Clad Memorial
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Well-Stocked Singer
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Bitter Parting
card.text: Exile target creature.

card.name: Reawakening
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vanish
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn. • Draw a card.

card.name: Comprehend
card.text: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Yestermantic Assistance
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Breathtaking Vista
card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. When you don't, target opponent may scry 1 at the beginning of their next upkeep. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Placid Icescape
card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. When you don't, target opponent may scry 1 at the beginning of their next upkeep. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. When you don't, target opponent may scry 1 at the beginning of their next upkeep. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. When you don't, target opponent may scry 1 at the beginning of their next upkeep. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. When you don't, target opponent may scry 1 at the beginning of their next upkeep. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.

card.text: Draw two cards. Discard a card unless you pay 2 life.

card.name: Incinerating Breath
card.text: Choose one or both — • Exile target creature. • Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Scout the Outlands
card.text: Search your library for a basic Plains, Island, or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Harvest of Clouds
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Mightkeeper Banner
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Snappytrap
card.text: This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Orearchaeologist
card.text: When this creature enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Whiptongue Toad
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.

card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Kindness CLE
card.text: You may scry 1 at the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Egg of the Elders
card.text: When this artifact enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. You gain 3 life. Create a 4/4 blue Dragon creature token.

card.name: Guards of Old Ovonia
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each name among lands you control. When this creature enters, destroy up to one target nonland permanent.

card.name: Memorial Stone
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Whenever you cast a spell, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Bronze Toad
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 3 life. When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Sunbeam Blade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +5/+5 and has trample. Equip {5}

card.name: Shimmering Bounty
card.text: Create three 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens.

card.name: Calamitous Miscast
card.text: Choose one or both — • Counter target spell. • Create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Fester
card.text: Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Bowl-Shell Beetle
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Patient Bumblerog
card.text: Aspire — When you cast a sorcery spell, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature, (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Cross Porpoises
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player mills cards equal to twice the number of Islands you control.

card.name: Canny Negotiator
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Menace When this creature enters, if it was kicked, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: White-Web Widow
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Keeper of the Shellseal
card.text: Whenever you attack with three or more creatures, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Heritage Reclamation
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Intangible Sage
card.text: Hexproof When this creature enters, mill five cards, then return a noncreature, nonland card milled this way to your hand. {2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Proud Judgewyrm
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Flying When this creature enters, if it was kicked, it deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature your opponents control.

card.name: Bubbletoad
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Curious Shinosaur
card.text: Aspire — When this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.) When this creature dies, if it aspired, create a tapped 2/2 green Ranger creature token.

card.name: Sunset Seeker
card.text: Vigilance Aspire — When you control two or more enchantments, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Monsoon Proctor
card.text: At the beginning of your second main phase, exile up to one target tapped creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Molten Dancer
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Bogberry Bloom
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of Swamps you control from the graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Stoic Outlander
card.text: Vigilance {6}, {T}: Look the top four cards of you library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value 2 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Plains you control.

card.name: Birchwood Blazewarden
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose one — • Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature with trample.

card.name: Stormwater Serpent
card.text: This creature enters tapped with four stun counters on it. Whenever an opponent or a permanent or spell an opponent controls becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, untap this creature.

card.name: Redscale Challenger
card.text: Haste Aspire — When this creature is dealt damage, put two +1/+1 counters on it. (Each aspire ability triggers only once. It must survive the damage to receive the counters.)

card.name: Sorrowmancer
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Archaeorator
card.text: As long as it's your turn and you control an enchantment, this creature has first strike and lifelink.

card.name: Foreign Chromawalker
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each color among permanents you control. Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Meticulous Quartermaster
card.text: Aspire — When you control three or more artifacts, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Draw two cards, then discard two cards. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Unleader's Tribune
card.text: Menace {7}: Create a 4/4 blue Dragon creature token with flying. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Bumbling Brewer
card.text: Menace Whenever you gain life, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Reef Walker
card.text: Elementals you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Reorganize
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you control a Wizard, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Artisanal Puzzlebox
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Stone-Masked Mage
card.text: Flying Aspire — When you cast a kicked spell, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Auroral Migrant
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control. Flying, vigilance.

card.name: Swiftmeleon
card.text: Flash Whenever you scry or surveil, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 2/2 green Ranger creature token.

card.name: Puzzlewyrm's Familiar
card.text: Flying Aspire — When you draw your third card in a turn turn, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Jaw Order Outfitter
card.text: Aspire — When a creature you control with menace deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and create a Treasure token. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Determined Snail
card.text: This creature can't block. At the beginning of your end step, if a non-Snail creature died this turn and this card is in your graveyard, you may pay {B}. If you do, return this card to the battlefield.

card.name: Dinoplomacy
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack. When a creature you control aspires, exile enchanted creature.

card.name: Follywog's Fate
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each Forest you control. It fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Potted Beanstalk
card.text: {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if this artifact entered this turn or you spent five or more mana to cast a spell this turn.

card.name: Ferocious Bite
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a creature with power 4 or greater. Ferocious Bite deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Riverwatch Glider
Moment's Respite
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) You gain 5 life. If this spell was kicked, you gain 10 life instead.

card.name: How the Dragon Got its Wings
Quickpocket
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {R}. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Cosmos Claw
card.text: Choose one — • All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. • Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Ponderous Ruinguard

card.name: Rumbling Grovewatch
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Sincere Impressionist
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) You may have this creature enter as a copy of another creature you control. If it was kicked, you may have it enter as a copy of a creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Ancient Amberflow
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you may discard your hand, then draw cards equal to the number of different powers among creatures you control.

card.name: Time-Bleached Dragon
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Flying When this creature enters, if it was kicked, you draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: Thistle Elemental
card.text: Reach This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Spell Pierce
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Discovery in Desperation
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library face-down. For as long as they remain exiled, you may look at them, and if you have no cards in hand you may play them.

card.name: Well-Stocked Reagents
card.text: {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Mill a card.

card.name: Antiquarian
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Lifelink When this creature enters, if it was kicked, search your library for an Aura, Saga, or Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Catch-and-Releaser
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, return a creature you control to its owner's hand. If this creature was kicked, create a token that's a copy of that creature.

card.name: Excellent Idea
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) Scry 2, then draw two cards. If this spell was kicked, instead scry 4, then draw four cards.

card.name: Resonant Glimmerfeli
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Pestermeleon
card.text: Flying Aspire — When this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Each opponent discards a card. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Lead Off the Path
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens.

card.name: Primarical Goggles
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {6}, {T}: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Fresh Start
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -5/-0 and loses all abilities.

card.name: Lava Arc
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Mountain you control. Lava Arc deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: Decry
card.text: Destroy target creature with power less than or equal to the number of card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Well-Rested
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, scry 1, then draw a card. Enchanted creature gets +1/+0.

card.name: Grove of Gathering
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may cast creature spells from the top of your library. {2}{G}: Scry 1.

card.name: Wide-Hooded Wizard
card.text: Vigilance Creatures your opponents control get -1/-0.

card.name: Stolid Secondmage
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Dark-Tales Connaisseur
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, if a player has 10 or less life, draw a card.

card.name: Vernon the Inventive
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Sinister Stew
card.text: You may cast creature cards from your graveyard. If a creature card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Honey-Flinger
card.text: Kicker {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell.) Haste When this creature enters, if it was kicked, it deals 2 damage to target creature an opponent controls. That creature can't block this turn.

card.name: (lifegain payoff)
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, return up to one target creature card with mana value less than or equal to the amount of life you gained this turn from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: The Moon Snail
card.text: Flying Whenever The Moon Snail deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one target nonland permanent you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Dragon CLE
card.text: Flying

card.name: The Legendary Mica
card.text: When Mica enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a legendary or Plains card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. Aspire — When you control three or more legendary permanents, put two +1/+1 counters on Mica. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Crackling Hearth
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Leader of the Lights
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Venturers' Return
card.text: Choose one or more — • Return target creature card with mana value 1 from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Return target creature card with mana value 2 from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Return target creature card with mana value 3 from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Ice-Sculptor Dragon
card.text: Flash Flying, lifelink

card.name: Get Some Time Alone
card.text: Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.) Each player chooses a creature they control. If this spell was kicked, instead for each player, you choose a creature they control. Destroy all creatures not chosen this way.

card.name: Cottonscale Drifter
card.text: Flash Flying Sacrifice this creature: Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Queen Bizabeth
card.text: Flying As Queen Bizabeth enters, choose a nonland card name. Spells with the chosen name can't be cast. Creatures with the chosen name can't attack or block.

card.name: Gabl, the Dancing Mandible
card.text: Double strike Whenever you attack with a number of creatures greater than Gabl's power, put a +1/+1 counter on Gabl.

card.name: Bigmancer Bilfin
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent to cast it is greater than its mana value, Bilfin gets +X/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn, where X is the difference.

card.name: (ferocious payoff)
card.text: Whenever (ferocious payoff) or another creature you control with power 4 or greater dies, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until your next end step.

card.name: Spiralpainter Shellsworth
card.text: When Shellsworth enters, if you cast it from your hand, exile the top seven cards of your library. For each number from 1 to 7, you may cast a card with that mana value from among them without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Havenback Tortoise
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature enters or attacks, search your library for up to two creature cards with different names with mana value 1, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Fountain of Stars
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if a token entered under your control this turn.

card.name: Chinook Encampment
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain. {T}: Add {R}. {5}{R}: This land becomes a 5/5 red Ranger creature with menace until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Crest, Ever-Talkative
card.text: Flying When Crest enters, scry 2. Aspire — When you cast your third spell in a turn, put two +1/+1 counters on Crest. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Mind Spring
card.text: Draw X cards. (scry / surveil?)

card.name: Orb of Old Shadows
card.text: Whenever a Wizard you control enters, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Arch-Chancellor Zybsalim
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack, draw a card.

card.name: Trisect Essence
card.text: Choose target creature you control. Create three tokens that are copies of it.

card.name: Wondrous Cadet
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token for each card you've drawn this turn.

card.name: Breaching Sprayback
card.text: Flash This spell can't be countered. Discard a card: Exile this creature. Return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next upkeep.

card.name: I Can Count to Three
card.text: (Saga)

card.name: Coming Storm
card.text: Kicker {2}{U} (You may pay an additional {2}{U} as you cast this spell.) Return target creature to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, instead return all creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Eelectrician
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature. It doesn't untap during its controller's untap step for as long as you control this creature.

card.name: Skylobite
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Monsooon Millery
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control an Island. {T}: Add {U}. {2}{U}: This land becomes a 2/2 blue Turtle creature with flying until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: (aurora creatureland)
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest. {T}: Add {G}. {6}{G}: This land becomes a 6/6 green <type> creature with trample until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Loess Town
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains. {T}: Add {W}. {4}{W}: This land becomes a 4/4 white Knight creature with first strike until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Comet Starcourse
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp. {T}: Add {B}. {3}{B}: This land becomes a 3/3 black Elemental creature with deathtouch until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Enthralling Gaze
card.text: Look at the top three cards of target opponent's library. Exile one of them face down and put the rest on the bottom of their library in a random order. You may play that card for as long as it remains exiled, and may spend mana of any color to cast it.

card.name: High Priestess Varga
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, you gain X life, where X is the total amount of life players lost this turn.

card.name: Gibbous, the Scaredybug
card.text: Flying When Gibbous enters, each player discards a card. Aspire — When there are twenty or more cards in your graveyard, put two +1/+1 counters on Gibbous. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Glowing Reminiscence
card.text: You draw X cards and you lose X life, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Bottom-Feeder
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens.

card.name: Exertion
card.text: Each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: Remnant of the Lost Clan
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay X life. If you do, draw X cards.

card.name: Homesick Sailor
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Grim Yestermancy
card.text: Kicker {3}{B} (You may pay an additional {3}{B} as you cast this spell.) Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If this spell was kicked, instead return all creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Easterly, Eager to Meet You
card.text: When Easterly enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. Aspire — When you attack with creatures with six or more unique creature types among them, put two +1/+1 counters on Easterly. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Glintstone's Chosen
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Unleader Sclo
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may pay {2}. If you do, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Most Helpful Tome
card.text: (Paradox)

card.name: Kindlotl
card.text: Menace Whenever a creature you control with menace attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Enchanted Eruption
card.text: Kicker {5}{R} (You may pay an additional {5}{R} as you cast this spell.) Exile target sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. Copy it. If this spell was kicked, copy it three times instead. You may cast the copies without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Magmablood Elder
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}{R}. You don't lose unspent red mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Starburst
card.text: This spell deals X damage to any target. (artifacts?)

card.name: Brew For the Weary
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Each player may discard their hand and draw five cards. (something creature-related — Menace?)

card.name: Pepper, the Precocious
card.text: When Pepper enters, reveal the top five cards of your library. Put a land card from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom in a random order. Aspire — When you control seven or more lands, put two +1/+1 counters on Pepper. (Each aspire ability triggers only once.)

card.name: Carefree Smudgebundler
card.text: Vigilance The first enchantment spell you cast each turn costs {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Shell Scout Leader
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Surveil 1. {2}{G}, {T}: Create a 2/2 green Ranger creature token. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Grandpa Garoom of Aurora
card.text: Trample You may play two additional lands each turn.

card.name: (kicker spell)
card.text: Kicker {3}{G} (You may pay an additional {3}{G} as you cast this spell.) Create two 2/2 green Ranger creature token. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

card.name: The Ranger's Creed
card.text: (saga)

card.name: Stupendulous Sporing
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile cards with total mana value 4 or greater. You may cast any number of spells from among them without paying their mana costs. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: (big creature)
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the total power of creatures you control. Trample Other creatures you control get +3/+3 and have trample.

card.name: (trample equip)
Leafcutter Disciple
card.text: Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: (anti-control card)
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Haste This creature has hexproof unless you were dealt damage this turn.

card.name: (todo list)
card.text: INSPECT: (life gain, draw, sorcery, legends, wizards, types in yard, solidarity, coven, power 4 or greater) TODO: (Aspir, flying, instants, artifact, types of field, rangers, scry / surveil, paradox, sagas) DONE: (colors, kicker, flurry, battalion, blink, enchantment, menace, valiant, morbid, 1-drop, tokens, mana values)

card.name: Ranger Knight Hatchling
card.text: Flying, lifelink, first strike Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Scry 1.
